name: accountants managing 10–50 clients monthly tool
description: For accountants managing 10–50 clients monthly, discrepancies between bank transactions and accounting entries cause cash flow gaps. We automatically match transactions instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: discrepancies between bank transactions and accounting entries
